items.body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

This is a **Management Plane Generator (MPG) migration tracking issue** for the `Azure.ResourceManager.MachineLearning` SDK (`sdk/machinelearningservices/`). It is a sub-issue of the parent tracking issue #53864 "Azure Mgmt Generator migration".

The goal is to migrate the SDK from Swagger/AutoRest-based generation to TypeSpec-based generation using the Azure Management Generator.

---

<details>
<summary>📋 Migration Context</summary>

- **Package**: `Azure.ResourceManager.MachineLearning`
- **SDK directory**: `sdk/machinelearningservices/Azure.ResourceManager.MachineLearning/`
- **Current state**: No `tsp-location.yaml` found — migration not yet started
- **Parent tracking issue**: #53864 (Azure Mgmt Generator migration)
- **TypeSpec source**: Should be in [azure-rest-api-specs](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs) under `specification/machinelearningservices/`
- **AzureSdkOwners (CodeGen + Mgmt)**: `@live1206` `@ArcturusZhang` `@ArthurMa1978`

</details>

<details>
<summary>✅ Migration Checklist</summary>

- [ ] Locate/confirm the TypeSpec spec in `azure-rest-api-specs` under `specification/machinelearningservices/`
- [ ] Create `tsp-location.yaml` in `sdk/machinelearningservices/Azure.ResourceManager.MachineLearning/`
- [ ] Run `tsp-client update` to generate the SDK from TypeSpec
- [ ] Build the generated SDK (`dotnet build`) and fix any compilation errors
- [ ] Compare public API surface against current `api/` listings — run `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 machinelearningservices`
- [ ] Identify and address any breaking changes (use `CodeGenSuppress`, `CodeGenType`, partial classes, or TypeSpec `@`@clientName`` / `@`@access`` decorators as needed)
- [ ] Run existing tests to ensure no regressions (`dotnet test --filter TestCategory!=Live`)
- [ ] Update `CHANGELOG.md` and bump the package version as appropriate
- [ ] Update `ci.mgmt.yml` if needed (`eng/scripts/Update-Mgmt-CI.ps1`)
- [ ] Pre-commit checks: run `dotnet format` and regenerate public API listings

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔧 Debugging Strategies & Reproduction Steps</summary>

**Common migration issues to watch for:**

1. **Sync methods missing `DiagnosticScope`** — a known mgmt emitter issue where sync method bodies are missing `using DiagnosticScope scope = ...` while async methods have it correctly. Results in `CS0103` errors.
2. **`@`@clientName`` on union types** — can cause broken `global::.TypeName` references in ModelFactory generated code. Fix with `CodeGenSuppress` + custom method.
3. **Flattened properties with models lacking public constructors** — can cause `FlattenPropertyVisitor` to crash. Check for flattened models.
4. **Breaking changes** — GA packages enforce API compatibility via ApiCompat. Use `CannotRemoveBaseTypeOrInterface` patterns with `@`@Azure`.ClientGenerator.Core.Legacy.hierarchyBuilding` if needed.

**Local regeneration flow:**
```powershell
# From repo root
cd eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt
npm install
# Then run tsp-client to sync spec:
tsp-client update --tsp-location sdk/machinelearningservices/Azure.ResourceManager.MachineLearning/tsp-location.yaml
# Build to check for errors:
dotnet build sdk/machinelearningservices/Azure.ResourceManager.MachineLearning/src/
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>📚 Useful Resources</summary>

- [MPG migration skill / patterns](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mpg-sdk-migration/SKILL.md)
- [Mitigating breaking changes](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mitigate-breaking-changes/SKILL.md)
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [azure-rest-api-specs machinelearningservices](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/tree/main/specification/machinelearningservices)
- Parent tracking issue: #53864

</details>
